label: Reflection, critique, verifier & repair loops

node.label: Reflection, critique, verifier & repair loops
node.definition: Reflection and verifier loops inspect intermediate work, compare it against tests or criteria, and revise, reject, or escalate candidate solutions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Reflection, critique, verifier & repair loops is to connect Self-consistency & best-of-N inference, Observe–plan–act agent loops to downstream capabilities including Autonomous software-engineering agents, Automated theorem proving & mathematical AI, Test-time compute scaling.
examples: substrate for Automated theorem proving & mathematical AI
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Self-consistency & best-of-N inference, Observe–plan–act agent loops.

dependencies.rationale: Reflection, critique, verifier & repair loops checks candidate behavior or artifacts against evidence or constraints from Self-consistency & best-of-N inference.
